hero.title: Tools you can rely on
hero.subtitle: Milling discs, hand tools and power tools for professionals and DIY enthusiasts – all in one place.

categories.title: Our tool categories
categories.subtitle: Choose from a wide range of quality tools and accessories.

milling.name: Milling discs
milling.description: Arbortech, Manpa and Piranha/Prano milling discs for angle and straight grinders, built for shaping and carving wood.

hand.name: Hand tools
hand.description: Carving chisels, knives and Saburrtooth carbide rasps for precise hand-worked woodcarving.

power.name: Power tools
power.description: Power chisels, straight and angle grinders, plus cordless tools for professional woodcarving and woodworking.

aboutSection.title: Who we are
aboutSection.text: Marián s.r.o. – a family company that has specialized in premium woodcarving and woodworking tools since 2013. We only stock internationally recognized, proven brands – Arbortech shaping tools from Australia, Saburrtooth rasps from the USA, Manpa milling tools from Korea, and Kirjes sanding systems from Sweden.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Reviews from satisfied customers.
testimonials.sourceNote: Reviews come from customers verified through the Heureka Verified by Customers service.

review1.name: Peter Novák
review1.text: We've been working with Maroško for years. They always have stock available and help us choose the right tools.

review2.name: Jana Kováčová
review2.text: Friendly service and quality tools at fair prices. My order arrived at home the very next day.

review3.name: Milan Horváth
review3.text: We use Maroško's milling discs every day - they last long and offer consistent quality.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to our customers' most common questions.

q1.question: How quickly do you deliver ordered tools?
q1.answer: In-stock items are shipped within 24 hours, courier delivery usually takes 1-2 business days.

q2.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q2.answer: We accept cash on delivery, card payment (Visa/Mastercard), bank transfer via QR code, or Sporopay for Slovenská sporiteľňa clients.

q3.question: Can I pick up the tools in person?
q3.answer: Yes, we're happy to hand over your tools in person – just arrange a pickup time with us at our company headquarters in Vrádište.

q4.question: Do you provide a warranty and service for the tools you sell?
q4.answer: We provide a statutory warranty on all goods and arrange post-warranty service if needed.

contactCta.title: Have a question about a specific item?
contactCta.subtitle: Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contactCta.note: Sending the message opens your email client with a pre-filled message to eshop.marosko@gmail.com.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Marián s.r.o. is a family business that has been selling premium imported woodcarving and woodworking tools in Slovakia since 2013. Our goal is to bring tools to market that you simply can't find in regular stores – tools that save carvers and DIY enthusiasts both time and money.
about.history: Our roots go back to 2011, when the Vercajch.eu project was founded; we took over all its rights in 2018. Today we run the shop under the eshop.marosko.sk brand, where in-stock items ship within 24 hours.
about.brands: We only stock proven international brands: Arbortech shaping and planing tools from Australia, Saburrtooth tungsten-carbide rasps from the USA, Manpa extension arms and milling attachments from Korea, and ARTU Tools carbide-tipped drill bits from Germany. Our range is rounded out with shellac, wood finishing waxes and certified protective work equipment.
about.philosophy: We personally put every tool we sell to the test before adding it to our range. Thanks to years of hands-on carving experience, we can judge not just its strengths but also its shortcomings – so we can give our customers genuinely honest, expert advice.
about.support: As a Slovak seller, we offer a full warranty, quality after-warranty service, and an invoice you can claim as an expense under industry subsidy schemes. We're proud to support Slovak artists and schools by making tools available that weren't previously accessible.

services.title: Our Categories
services.subtitle: You'll find our full range of tools and accessories in our e-shop.

angleGrinder.name: Angle grinder tools
angleGrinder.description: Milling, gouging and sanding attachments that turn an ordinary angle grinder into a precision carving tool for hard and soft wood, bone or plastics.

drill.name: Drill tools
drill.description: Burning and shaping cutters, hollowing bits and flexible shafts that turn an ordinary drill into a tool for hollowing, shaping and fine detail work in wood.

straightGrinder.name: Straight grinder tools + SABURRTOOTH
straightGrinder.description: Saburrtooth needle rasps and Manpa tooth cutters for straight micro-grinders – for fine detail, drapery and hard-to-reach spots on sculptures.

miniMill.name: Mini mill tools Ø 50 mm
miniMill.description: Compact milling and sanding attachments with a 50 mm shank for mini mills such as Proxxon, Arbortech Mini Carver or Makita.

powerTools.name: Power tools
powerTools.description: Power Chisel electric chisels, Mini Carver grinders and other professional machines for sculptors and carvers.

cordless.name: Cordless tools
cordless.description: Cordless mini-grinders and carving kits for working without being tied to an extension cord.

customAbrasive.name: Custom-cut abrasives
customAbrasive.description: Round abrasive cutouts from 50 to 600 mm, with or without hook-and-loop backing, made to match your machine and chosen grit.

handTools.name: Hand tools
handTools.description: Carving chisels, knives, files and sharpening stones for precise hand work in the workshop or on site.

coatings.name: Coatings, fillers and abrasives
coatings.description: Shellac polishes, wood stains and spirit for fast-drying, food-safe wood finishes.

protective.name: Protective equipment and workwear
protective.description: Gloves, glasses, respirators and even lumbar support belts to protect you during longer sessions with your tools.

spareParts.name: Replacement spare parts
spareParts.description: Replacement carriers, adapters and parts that extend the life of your tools.

stands.name: Stands and clamping equipment
stands.description: Vices, clamps and mounting brackets for stable, safe clamping of material and tools.

misc.name: Miscellaneous small items
misc.description: Cleaning rubbers, polishing pastes and other small items that didn't fit any other category.

carvingBlanks.name: Carving guide bars for chainsaws
carvingBlanks.description: Specialized guide bars with a reinforced 17–25 mm nose, designed for tip-carving work when shaping wood.

shankTools.name: Shank tools
shankTools.description: Shank-mounted cutters, burr bits and joining cutters for both carpentry workshops and carving work.

brands.title: Brands & Manufacturers
brands.subtitle: An overview of all the tool and material brands available in our range.
brands.intro: Over the years we've curated trusted manufacturers and brands that guarantee quality, durability and reliability in woodcarving and woodworking tools. Below you'll find an overview of the brands whose products we carry.

arbortech.description: Arbortech is an Australian brand founded in 1983, specializing in innovative power tools for carvers and craftsmen – the Power Chisel, Mini Carver, TURBO Plane, Industrial Woodcarver and Ball Gouge. It focuses on quality, ergonomics and precise wood shaping.

artu.description: ARTU Tools GmbH is a German company operating since 1979, specializing in carbide drill bits with a heat-resistant tip rated up to 1100 °C. The bits handle hardened steel, masonry, stone, glass and ceramics, with or without hammer action.

saburrtoothUsa.description: Saburrtooth is an American brand of rotary tools for shaping, cutting and grinding wood. Its patented open-pattern carbide teeth ensure fast material removal, long life and resistance to clogging – available as discs, rasps and mounted burrs.

akkaTools.description: AKKA Tools (AKKO) is a Turkish manufacturer of industrial tools founded in 1986, which grew from a small workshop into a modern 40,000 m² factory. The brand relies on state-of-the-art production technology and uncompromising quality.

kingArthurUsa.description: King Arthur's Tools is an American manufacturer of power tools and accessories for carvers, sculptors and craftsmen (since 1992), based in Florida and exporting to over 50 countries. It is known for its patented products Lancelot®, Merlin2® and Holey Galahad®.

silverline.description: Silverline offers a 3-year warranty on its products after registration, along with a wide range of available accessories and spare parts for its tool line-up.

tarpolProfesional.description: TARPOL Profesional makes rasp discs for angle grinders from hardened steel with a “B” safety certificate. It offers three coarseness grades and a wide range of shapes for wood, plastics, soft metals and aerated concrete.

extolPremium.description: Extol Premium is a Czech brand (Madal Bal a.s.) of professional mid-range hand, power and cordless tools – hardened steel, durable motors and anti-vibration features.

triton.description: Triton Tools is an Australian manufacturer of professional power tools founded in 1976, focused on woodworking and metalworking – routers, sanders, table and mitre saws. It builds on precision, durable materials and patented solutions.

andrejIrsa.description: Andrej Irša is a distinctive Slovak sculptor — from realistic figures to abstract works such as Molecules, Entities and Spiralius. His work combines wood, metal, plastic and 3D printing, and he has authored expert publications on chainsaw carving, one of which serves as accredited teaching material.

manpa.description: Manpa Tools is a South Korean brand (since 1988) making angle grinder attachments for shaping, gouging and texturing wood. Interchangeable carbide heads ensure a deeper cut, smoother surface and lower vibration during work.

tuson.description: TUSON makes a wide range of hand and power tools and workshop equipment with a great quality-to-price ratio, focused on functionality and reliability.

kirjes.description: Kirjes is a Swedish brand with a long history in wood sanding and shaping, offering a complete system – from rough shaping (Orbi Cut) through precision sanding with inflatable drums to fine polishing with organic waxes.

pferdTools.description: PFERD TOOLS is a German family-owned company operating in more than 100 countries, synonymous with high-quality, precise and innovative tools.

ceraNovecento.description: Cera Novecento is an Italian brand with over 40 years of tradition (since 1985), producing natural beeswax-based waxes for treating wood, terracotta, marble and leather. The products enhance the natural beauty of materials with a subtle sheen.

mstein.description: M-stein is a Slovak family brand with a 30-year tradition of hand-crafting professional carving tools. Its chisels, knives and gravers are made by traditional hand forging from proven Swedish carbon steel — every piece passes through the hands of experienced masters, from raw material to a finished tool with its characteristic octagonal handle.

totalToolsCo.description: Total Tools is a global tool brand with over 20 years of experience, one of the largest tool manufacturers in China. The TOTAL line offers quality, affordable tools for DIY users, while the Industrial line steps up a notch.

hermes.description: Hermes is a German abrasives manufacturer with over 90 years of tradition, a direct competitor to brands like 3M and Norton. Ceramic grain and J-flex technology ensure high material removal rates and long tool life.

extolCraft.description: Extol Craft is an affordable tool line for DIY users – simple controls and a lighter build for everyday repairs and hobby projects, without unnecessarily overpriced features.

kutzall.description: Kutzall is an American brand (since 1960) of tungsten carbide-coated tools for shaping wood, metal and fiberglass – aggressive cutting, extreme durability and resistance to clogging.

noris.description: NORIS specializes in high-quality gold leaf, popular among restorers, artists and craftsmen.

stubai.description: The STUBAI range comes from Austria's Stubai valley, with an ironworking tradition dating back to the 14th century. Since 1897, a cooperative of member companies has hand-ground chisels and carving knives from carbon steel (58–60 HRC) in nearly 600 variants.

charbonnel.description: Charbonnel Paris is a French manufacturer operating since 1862, a top-tier supplier of gilding and silvering preparations and inks for intaglio printing and lithography. Over 150 years of experience guarantee craftsmen uncompromising quality.

pr05.description: PR05 makes diamond and carbide tools for dry cutting of the hardest materials – from reinforced concrete and paving to solid wooden beams.

fortum.description: FORTUM is professional tooling developed directly by craftsmen, built on quality materials and patented improvements for precise, demanding work.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Browse samples of the tools we carry.

milling.title: Milling discs for angle grinders
milling.short: The legendary Arbortech and Piranha/Prano discs, plus the full Manpa lineup, all in one place.
milling.description: Carving discs for angle grinders for shaping and sculpting wood — the legendary Arbortech Woodcarver PROFI-INDUSTRIAL, the Turbo Plane planing disc, the Ball Gouge, Manpa and Akka Tools cutters with replaceable carbide teeth, and Squire chain discs by King Arthur's Tools. Fast stock removal for roughing out sculptures, bowls and troughs. Only products currently in stock are shown.

p720.title: 4-tooth cutter with 8 mm round profile, Ø 95 mm, M10 mount

p721.title: 3-tooth cutter with 16 mm triangular profile, Ø 70 mm

p984.title: Arbortech Mini Turbo carving attachment, kit

p382.title: Squire chain carving disc, 12 teeth, 14 mm bore

p368.title: Toothed rasp disc 50 mm for Arbortech Mini Grinder and Merlin

planing.title: Planing Tools
planing.short: Blade-style planing discs and attachments from Arbortech for shaping, hollowing, and smoothing wood.
planing.description: Blade-style planing tools and angle-grinder discs from the Australian manufacturer Arbortech - great for shaping wooden sculptures and bowls, flattening surfaces, texturing, and hollowing out cavities.

arbortechBallGouge.title: Arbortech Ball Gouge – hollowing carver
arbortechBallGouge.description: A carving tool for easily creating smooth, hollow, rounded shapes in wood and plastic. Great for carving wooden spoons, small bowls, or fine details.

arbortechTurboPlane.title: Arbortech Turbo Plane – planing disc
arbortechTurboPlane.description: Turns an angle grinder into a shaping and planing tool. Removes wood faster than coarse sandpaper while leaving a smooth, tear-free surface. Great for sculptures, bowls, boats, and routing grooves. The three carbide blades can be re-sharpened.

arbortechWoodcarverProfiIndustrial.title: Arbortech Woodcarver PROFI-INDUSTRIAL – milling disc
arbortechWoodcarverProfiIndustrial.description: A professional milling disc for heavy material removal when hollowing, milling, shaping, or cutting wood. The Ø 8 mm carbide teeth last a long time without sharpening – when worn, simply rotate or replace them.

arbortechWoodcarverProfiIndustrialKryt.title: Arbortech Woodcarver PROFI-INDUSTRIAL – with guard
arbortechWoodcarverProfiIndustrialKryt.description: A very fast, effective tool for hollowing, milling, shaping, or cutting wood, in a version with a protective guard.

akkoFrezovaciKotuc.title: AKKO Tools – milling disc
akkoFrezovaciKotuc.description: A very fast, effective disc for hollowing, milling, shaping, or cutting wood.

arbortechPrecisionCarvingSystem.title: Arbortech Precision Carving System – kit
arbortechPrecisionCarvingSystem.description: A precision carving system that turns an angle grinder into a detailed carving workshop. A set of interchangeable tools (Ø 15-16 mm arbor) for shaping, texturing, and sanding wood, ice, or plastic – ideal for hollows in spoons, bowls, vases, or detail work.

arbortechTurboScraper.title: Arbortech Turbo Scraper 100 mm – turbo scraper
arbortechTurboScraper.description: A disc designed to minimize tear-out and splintering thanks to its negative cutting angle. Glides gently across the wood for a flawless result even on demanding projects.

arbortechSpheroPlane.title: Arbortech SpheroPlane – milling attachment with sanding system
arbortechSpheroPlane.description: New from Arbortech - creates a round wooden bowl or sphere without needing a lathe.

directGrinder.title: Die grinder accessories
directGrinder.short: Mounted burrs, needle rasps and accessories for die grinders and micro grinders.
directGrinder.description: Tools for die grinders and micro grinders (Dremel, Proxxon, Extol and more) for detail work — Saburrtooth carbide mounted burrs and needle rasps in cylinder, ball, taper and flame shapes, flexible shafts and other accessories. Only products currently in stock are shown.

needleDiscs.title: Needle rasp discs for wood
needleDiscs.short: Saburrtooth carbide needle rasp discs for angle grinders — fast wood sanding and shaping.
needleDiscs.description: Needle rasp grinding discs for angle grinders — Saburrtooth USA carbide discs for fast sanding, shaping and rough carving of wood. Flat, convex, angled and cup rasps in grits from very fine to extra coarse, diameters 44.5 to 180 mm. They resist clogging, don't burn the wood and outlast sandpaper many times over. Only products currently in stock are shown.

drillMilling.short: Orbi Cut hollowing balls and Manpa cutter heads with replaceable carbide blades for power drills.

Turn an ordinary drill or flexible shaft into a carving tool — perfect for making bowls, spoons, hollows and fine wood shaping. Only products currently in stock are shown.

The range covers Merlin chain-type mini carving discs with carbide teeth, toothed and needle mini rasp discs, diamond discs, fibre sanding discs and spare parts. Perfect for detailed shaping, carving and sanding of wood in hard-to-reach places. Only products currently in stock are shown.

The arm extends your grinder's reach for carving deep hollows, bowls and troughs. Only products currently in stock are shown.

badges.topSale: Top Product of the Month · Sale

videos.title: Videos & guides
videos.subtitle: See our tools in action.
videos.intro: Short clips from the workshop and the field — how our tools handle roughing out, hollowing, sanding and finishing wood. Below each video you'll find a link to the products shown in it.

manpaMultiCutterMaster.title: Manpa Multi Cutter Master – milling in the field
manpaMultiCutterMaster.description: The Manpa Multi Cutter Master extension arm with a milling disc in action outdoors — fast, precise shaping and hollowing of a branch, ready for further carving.

arbortechContourSander.title: Arbortech Contour Sander – sanding rounded shapes
arbortechContourSander.description: The Arbortech Contour Random Sander vibrating attachment turns an angle grinder into a unique eccentric sanding tool — its flexible Ø 50 mm rubber pad conforms perfectly to rounded and irregular shapes without burning the wood or leaving visible sanding marks.

lesticaSada.title: Ø 30 cm polishing set – finishing a large statue
lesticaSada.description: A professional polishing set with a 12 cm shaft and a Ø 30 cm polishing disc finishing a large wooden statue — the large disc covers more surface at once, and the shaft fits most hand polishers and angle grinders.

orbiCut.title: Hollowing wood with the Orbi Cut ball
orbiCut.description: Fast, precise wood hollowing with the Orbi Cut ball mounted on a drill — ideal for bowls, hollows and fine shaping.

rasplovyKotucOstryKraj.title: 125 mm rasp disc with sharp edge – close-up
rasplovyKotucOstryKraj.description: Hand-cut 125 mm rasp disc with a sharp V-profile edge, made of hardened carbon steel (40 HRC) — for wood removal, modelling, grooving, carpentry and restoration work.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: News, tips and tool spotlights from our e-shop eshop.marosko.sk.
blog.intro: On this blog you'll find practical tips, how-tos and spotlights on new arrivals from our range of woodcarving and woodworking tools. Every article links straight through to the original post on eshop.marosko.sk, where you can also buy the product directly.

saburrtoothRasple.title: Saburrtooth USA Shank Burrs – a Guide to Shapes and Grits
saburrtoothRasple.description: An overview of the American Saburrtooth shank burrs – shapes, color-coded grits, and practical uses for carvers, sculptors, and modelers.

manpaOci.title: Manpa Eye-Shaping Burrs – Set of 8
manpaOci.description: A set of 8 tools for shaping and fine-burning eyes, scales, and decorative rings on wooden figures – no more tedious hand-carving.

manpaEzSander.title: Manpa EZ Sander 65 mm – Flap Sanding Wheel
manpaEzSander.description: A flexible sanding attachment for smoothing uneven surfaces, hollows, and rounded shapes – it flexes to match the workpiece.

dlataZaciatocnik.title: Choosing Chisels for Beginners (M-stein)
dlataZaciatocnik.description: A set of hand chisels optimized for smaller projects and beginner carvers, from a Slovak manufacturer.

stubaiSada.title: Stubai – 4-Piece Beginner Chisel Set
stubaiSada.description: A high-quality 4-piece Austrian chisel set suited for figures, relief carving, or hobby carving, in a practical roll-up pouch.

arbortechMiniGrinder.title: Arbortech Mini Grinder MG1000 – Cordless Set
arbortechMiniGrinder.description: A cordless carving tool with a brushless motor for detailed woodwork, part of the "Woodworking Pack" set.

arbortechMiniCarver.title: Arbortech Mini Carver 1000W – Electric Carver
arbortechMiniCarver.description: A powerful electric carving tool with 6-speed control (6,000–18,000 rpm), the successor to the Mini Grinder, with dust extraction and low vibration.

arbortechWoodcarverProfi.title: Arbortech Woodcarver PROFI-INDUSTRIAL Carving Disc
arbortechWoodcarverProfi.description: A carbide disc with replaceable rotating teeth and 25× longer lifespan, suited for hard and soft wood, laminate, and plastics.

arbortechContourSander.title: Arbortech Contour Random Sander
arbortechContourSander.description: A random-orbital sander developed specifically for sanding irregular shapes and curves – the rotating and vibrating motion complement each other so the grit never passes over the same spot twice. The proven Contour Sander got an upgrade: fiber discs mounted with a center screw replaced the original cloth sanding sleeves.

arbortechTurboScraper.title: Arbortech Turbo Scraper 100 mm
arbortechTurboScraper.description: The specially designed disc cuts at a negative angle and glides smoothly across the wood – minimizing tear-out and delivering clean results even on demanding projects. Rather than removing material, it smooths the surface much like a glass scraper; the teeth can be rotated once dull, giving the tool an exceptionally long lifespan.

arbortechSpheroplane.title: Arbortech SpheroPlane
arbortechSpheroplane.description: Shape a wooden bowl or sphere without a lathe – SpheroPlane attaches to your angle grinder and has an adjustable cutting radius for both small and large projects. It comes with a sanding system for finishing the surface, and works with any standard 115/125 mm angle grinder as well as the Arbortech Power Carving Unit.

arbortechTurboPlane.title: Arbortech Turbo Plane
arbortechTurboPlane.description: A revolutionary tool that combines a plane, router, and sander in one compact device for cutting, shaping, and finishing wood. Adjustable angle and cutting depth allow precise work, while a protective guard and anti-kickback system keep it safe to use.

manpaTrojuholnikovaFrezka.title: Manpa 3-Wing Triangular Profile Cutter, Ø 100 mm
manpaTrojuholnikovaFrezka.description: The pointed, sharp-contoured profile lets you carve precise waves, grooves, and fine textures in a single pass – ideal for imitating hair, fur, or other detailed textures. The new 100 mm version (22 mm bore) mounts directly on a standard angle grinder, no adapter needed.

suchyZips.title: Hook-and-Loop Backing Pads – Made to Order
suchyZips.description: A clean, reusable way to attach sanding discs – both the hook and adhesive sides cut to your exact diameter.

silverlineLesticka.title: Silverline Polisher, 180 mm, 1200 W
silverlineLesticka.description: A powerful polisher with a 180 mm pad and variable speed control (600–3500 rpm), suited for polishing and sanding metal, wood, and lacquered surfaces.

arbortechPowerChisel.title: Arbortech Power Chisel – Electric Chisel, 7-Piece Set
arbortechPowerChisel.description: A new-generation electric chisel combining the power of an electric drive with the finesse of hand woodcarving. A 7-piece set with quick blade changes, suited for detail carving and heavier stock removal alike.

hriadelDoLestickyKotuc.title: Polisher Shaft for Discs
hriadelDoLestickyKotuc.description: A universal disc mandrel with an M14 thread that turns an angle grinder or polisher into a FlexTrim disc polishing system. Suited for finishing large curved surfaces. Specs: M14 thread, 50 mm clamping diameter, 118 mm length, 1.8 kg.

brusnySystemFlexTrim.title: Polishing System (FlexTrim Bristle Polishing Disc)
brusnySystemFlexTrim.description: An industrial FlexTrim polishing disc adapted for craft work – quickly and effectively polishes large flat and curved surfaces. Disc diameter 30 cm, width 12 cm, M14 mount. An extension shaft for better reach is included in the set.

hlbiaceZvonkoveFrezy.title: Bell-Shaped Hollowing Cutters
hlbiaceZvonkoveFrezy.description: Specialized bell-shaped cutters for creating deep hollows and rounded recesses in wood – ideal for artistic wood carving, bowls, seats, or decorative elements. Compatible with Manpa tools; recommended for use with the Grinder Holder extension. Diameters from 45 mm to 75 mm.

drazkovaciaFrezovaciaStopka.title: Grooving Milling Bit, 20 mm Diameter
drazkovaciaFrezovaciaStopka.description: Manpa Crack Cutter – a milling bit for an angle grinder with a 20 mm diameter and 200 mm overall length. Suited for precise grooves for joining boards, inlaying glass, or decorative purposes, and for working in narrow, hard-to-reach spots.

brusnyPapierVysekyNaMieru.title: Sanding Paper – Custom-Cut Discs
brusnyPapierVysekyNaMieru.description: Custom-cut sanding discs for grinders with a diameter from 50 mm up to 600 mm – a solution for anyone with a grinder that takes an unusually large disc.

saburrtoothExtremeFrezy.title: Saburrtooth Extreme Burrs
saburrtoothExtremeFrezy.description: A new premium EXTREME line from SaburrTooth USA – router bits with a more aggressive tooth profile for maximum material removal, while keeping the brand's legendary durability. Two new grits: Mega (blue coating) and Giga (purple coating). Built for professionals on large projects.

brusnyHribikNaDokoncovacie.title: Finishing Sanding Mop
brusnyHribikNaDokoncovacie.description: A soft, flexible sanding mop made from 6 layers of non-woven abrasive fabric (Scotch-Brite) – ideal for fine sanding and polishing rounded, curved, and oval shapes. Works on wood, metal, plastic, and composites.

predlzovacieRamenoMulticutter.title: Extension Arm with Multi-Purpose Attachment
predlzovacieRamenoMulticutter.description: Manpa Multicutter Master – an extension arm for angle grinders for working in hard-to-reach, narrow spaces. Improves safety (a safe distance from the spinning disc), easy to install, rugged corrosion-resistant components, and quick accessory changes.

rustikalnyEfektDreva.title: Rustic Wood Effect (Wire Brush Wheel)
rustikalnyEfektDreva.description: An arbor for wire-ring segments that mounts directly onto an angle grinder and turns it into a wood wire-brushing tool – no need to buy a separate machine. Slide the required number of brush rings onto the shaft, separated by spacers, then tighten to lock the segment against slipping.

priamaBruska500w.title: Straight Grinder 500 W (Extol)
priamaBruska500w.description: Extol Premium straight grinder with 500 W power and a no-load speed of 28,000 rpm, 6 mm collet, weighing about 1.6 kg. Suited for carving, shaping, and working wood, plastics, and rubber – from rough shaping to fine details, sculptures, busts, and relief carving.

predlzenieHriadelaM14.title: Angle Grinder Shaft Extension, M14 – M14
predlzenieHriadelaM14.description: An M14/M14 threaded extension that lets you use tools further away from the angle grinder's body – handy for tight angles or reaching greater depths, e.g. on deeper bowls or vases.

arbortechPowerCarvingUnit.title: Arbortech Power Carving Unit
arbortechPowerCarvingUnit.description: An electric grinder from Arbortech, designed in-house specifically to get the most out of the entire Arbortech accessory range (cutting, planing, sanding, milling). Fitted with an anti-vibration handle and soft start, with variable speed for all-round use.

redukciaM146mm.title: M14 to 6 mm Adapter (Reducer)
redukciaM146mm.description: A metal reducer/adapter with an M14 thread for angle grinders and a 6 mm bore – lets you fit smaller shank tools (e.g. needle rasps, fine sanding discs, polishing pads) that are normally made for a drill. Simple screw-on installation, made from quality steel.

frezovaciaStopkaTurboshaft.title: Turboshaft Milling Bit
frezovaciaStopkaTurboshaft.description: Arbortech's 20 mm Turboshaft milling bit for detailed freehand shaping, hollowing, and grooving of wood. Two replaceable, indexable carbide cutting teeth, adjustable depth stop, and a longer, narrower shaft for working deep, narrow profiles. Fits 100/115 mm angle grinders, minimum 9,000 rpm.

ihlickovaRasplaGulataHruba.title: Round Needle Rasp, No Holes, Ø 100 mm, Coarse (Green)
ihlickovaRasplaGulataHruba.description: A professional coarse needle rasp from Saburrtooth (USA), 100 mm diameter, for angle grinders, max. 14,000 rpm. Coarse grit for fast material removal, long-lasting carbide needles, with gaps between needles that prevent overheating and scorching the wood. Suited for wood, laminate, plastics, and rubber – not for metal or stone.

rasplaZapustenaJemna115mm.title: Recessed Fine Flat Rasp Disc, 115 mm (KZR-53)
rasplaZapustenaJemna115mm.description: The KZR-53 rasp disc, 115 mm diameter, 22.2 mm arbor. Its recessed flat shape lets you grind right up to the edge without the clamping nut getting in the way. Fine cut – suited for stripping paint, varnish, and adhesives without damaging the surface underneath, on wood, plastics, fiberglass, rubber, and leather. Not suited for aerated concrete.

ihlickovaRasplaPlochaExtraHruba.title: Flat Straight Needle Rasp, Ø 100 mm, Extra Coarse (Orange)
ihlickovaRasplaPlochaExtraHruba.description: An extra coarse needle rasp from Saburrtooth (USA), 100 mm diameter, max. 14,000 rpm. The flat shape is ideal for working on flat surfaces (boards, planks). Extreme material removal, long-lasting carbide needles. Suited for wood, laminate, plastics, and rubber – not for metal or stone.

kotucovaSekanaRaspla.title: Toothed rasp disc for Arbortech Mini Grinder and Merlin, 50 mm
kotucovaSekanaRaspla.description: Hand-cut 50 mm rasp disc for the Arbortech Mini Grinder, Mini Carver and Merlin. Ideal for fast, aggressive shaping, rough carving and texturing wood.

diamantovyKotucDrazkovy.title: Grooved diamond grinding disc, grit 126/39
diamantovyKotucDrazkovy.description: Grooved diamond grinding disc with two grits and a self-cooling effect. Universal mounting for angle grinders and drills — for sharpening carbide, steel, ceramics and glass.

rasplovyKotucPlochyGulataHrana.title: Hand-cut rasp disc, flat with rounded edge, 125 mm
rasplovyKotucPlochyGulataHrana.description: Hand-cut 125 mm rasp disc — flat with a rounded edge. Extreme wood removal, ideal for shaping, debarking and stripping old finishes with an angle grinder.

miniRasplaSekana.title: Hand-cut mini rasp
miniRasplaSekana.description: Hand-cut Ø 50 mm mini rasp made of hardened steel for Arbortech, Proxxon, Merlin and Parkside mini carvers. For wood shaping, carving and rough stock removal.

ihlickovaSikmaDrsna.title: Angled convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, rough
ihlickovaSikmaDrsna.description: Saburrtooth carbide needle rasp disc, angled convex without holes, Ø 100 mm, rough grit. Works on wood, laminate, plastics, rubber, paints and finishes — long life, clog-resistant.

ihlickovaSikmaJemna.title: Angled convex needle rasp disc without holes, fine, 100 mm
ihlickovaSikmaJemna.description: Angled convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, fine grit. For fine shaping of wood, chipboard, laminate, plastics and more with an angle grinder.

ihlickovaSikmaExtraHruba.title: Angled convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, extra coarse
ihlickovaSikmaExtraHruba.description: Angled convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, extra coarse (orange). Maximum stock removal when roughing out wood with an angle grinder.

ihlickovaGulataJemna.title: Convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, fine
ihlickovaGulataJemna.description: Convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, fine grit. Universal use on wood, laminate, plastics, polyurethane and fillers — a smooth finish without burning.

rasplaValcovaKvo122.title: Cylindrical rasp 120 × 20 × 222 mm, KVO 122
rasplaValcovaKvo122.description: Cylindrical rasp 120 × 20 × 222 mm (KVO 122) for sanding and shaping wood surfaces, removing under-bark layers and cleaning weathered or painted wood.

rasplovyPilovyKotuc125.title: Recessed rasp saw disc 125 mm
rasplovyPilovyKotuc125.description: Recessed 125 mm rasp saw disc (KUZ-64) — cuts and shapes in one tool. Saw teeth on the rim, rasp teeth on the face; for wood, plastics and aerated concrete.

nahradnyNozBallGouge.title: Ball Gouge replacement blade
nahradnyNozBallGouge.description: Genuine replacement blade for the Arbortech Ball Gouge hollowing carver. Hardened steel, 30 mm diameter, quick swap of a worn cutting edge.

rucneSekaneRasple.title: Hand-cut rasp discs
rucneSekaneRasple.description: Hand-cut rasp discs for angle grinders on wood. Extreme stock removal, 40 HRC hardened steel, a solid and safe design for grinders from 850 W up.

rasplovyKotucOval.title: Hand-cut rasp disc with rounded edge, 125 mm, oval
rasplovyKotucOval.description: Hand-cut 125 mm rasp disc, oval with a rounded edge (U profile). Ideal for grooves, flutes and shaping rounded surfaces in wood.

rasplovyKotucVecko.title: Hand-cut rasp disc with sharp edge, 125 mm, V profile
rasplovyKotucVecko.description: Hand-cut 125 mm rasp disc with a sharp V-profile edge. For flat surfaces, modelling, grooving and carpentry work on log buildings.

ihlickovaGulataDrsna.title: Convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, rough
ihlickovaGulataDrsna.description: Convex needle rasp disc without holes, Ø 100 mm, rough grit. Long-lasting carbide needles for aggressive wood shaping with an angle grinder.

shops.title: Our Shops
shops.subtitle: Three e-shops, one goal – quality woodcarving and woodworking tools for every customer.

marosko.name: eshop.marosko.sk
marosko.description: Our main and largest shop, where most of our customers order. You'll find our complete range here – woodcarving and woodworking tools, milling discs, hand and power tools, and all the accessories in one place.

vercajch.name: Vercajch.eu
vercajch.description: A project that started back in 2011. We took over all its rights in 2018, and it's been part of our family of shops ever since.

rezbarskeNaradie.name: RezbárskeNáradie.sk
rezbarskeNaradie.description: Our newest project, created to make it easier for customers to find their way around. While eshop.marosko.sk is a general tool shop, RezbárskeNáradie.sk focuses purely on woodcarving tools – so it's easier to find and easier to remember.

contact.title: Contact
contact.authority: Supervisory authority: Slovak Trade Inspectorate (SOI) for the Trnava Region, Pekárska 23, 917 01 Trnava 1, Slovakia
contact.shippingNote: Free shipping over €150, in-stock items ship within 24 hours.
contact.formTitle: Have a question for us or about our products? Don't hesitate to get in touch.
contact.formSubtitle: Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

home.title: Marián s.r.o. – Woodcarving & Woodworking Tools
home.description: Milling discs, carving chisels, and power tools from Arbortech, Manpa, and Saburrtooth. A family business since 2013.

about.title: About Us | Marián s.r.o.
about.description: We're a family business specializing in branded woodcarving and woodworking tools since 2013. Learn our story and the brands we carry.

categories.title: Tool Categories | Marián s.r.o.
categories.description: A complete overview of our woodcarving and woodworking tool categories – milling discs, hand and power tools, and accessories.

brands.title: Brands & Manufacturers | Marián s.r.o.
brands.description: An overview of trusted woodcarving and woodworking tool brands and manufacturers available at eshop.marosko.sk.

gallery.title: Tool Gallery | Marián s.r.o.
gallery.description: A photo gallery of our tools – browse milling discs and other products from our range.

videos.title: Video guides and tool demos | Marián s.r.o.
videos.description: Short video clips of our woodcarving and woodworking tools in action — roughing out, hollowing, sanding and wood finishing.

blog.title: Blog | Marián s.r.o.
blog.description: News, tips and tool spotlights from our e-shop eshop.marosko.sk.

shops.title: Our Shops | Marián s.r.o.
shops.description: An overview of all our e-shops – eshop.marosko.sk, Vercajch.eu, and RezbárskeNáradie.sk.

contact.title: Contact | Marián s.r.o.
contact.description: Contact and billing details for Marián s.r.o. Write to us or reach us by phone.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy | Marián s.r.o.
gdpr.description: Information about personal data processing and cookie usage on the Marián s.r.o. website.

banner.text: This site uses cookies to provide basic functionality, and with your consent also for analytics and displaying embedded content. You can change your choice at any time in the site footer.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site's basic functionality. Cannot be turned off.

analytics.title: Performance / analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how you use the site (Google Analytics).

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Enable embedded content, e.g. maps or videos.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy
gdpr.intro: This document explains what personal data we process, for what purpose, for how long, and what rights you have in connection with it.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.text: The controller of this website and of the personal data processed on it is Marián s.r.o., registered at Vrádište 138, 908 49 Vrádište, Slovak Republic, Company ID (IČO): 47546298, Tax ID (DIČ): 2023992916. For any questions about the processing of personal data, please contact us at eshop.marosko@gmail.com.

purposes.title: What data we process and why
purposes.text:
If you contact us through the contact form on the site, we process the data you provide yourself – name, email, phone number, and the content of your message. We process this data to handle your inquiry, based on our legitimate interest in responding to visitor inquiries, or based on steps taken toward entering into a contract (Article 6(1)(b) and (f) GDPR).

If you consent to analytics cookies in the cookie banner, we also process data about your behavior on the site through Google Analytics, solely on the basis of your consent (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR), which you may withdraw at any time.

retention.title: Data retention period
retention.text: We keep contact-form data only for as long as necessary to handle your inquiry and a reasonable period afterward in case of follow-up communication, but no longer than 12 months from the last exchange, unless a specific legal requirement (e.g. accounting or tax law) requires a longer retention period. Data processed on the basis of consent (analytics) is retained for as long as that consent remains valid.

recipients.title: Recipients of personal data
recipients.text: Your personal data may be shared with the following recipients who provide us with technical services: Vercel Inc. (website hosting and operation) and Google LLC (Google Analytics – only if you consent to analytics cookies). We do not share your data with other third parties for marketing purposes.

transfers.title: International data transfers
transfers.text: Our service providers (Vercel, Google) may process data on servers located outside the European Union/EEA. In such cases, the transfer is protected by appropriate safeguards under GDPR, in particular the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission under Article 46 GDPR.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: In connection with the processing of your personal data, you have the right to access your data, request its correction or erasure, restrict its processing, request data portability, and object to processing. Where processing is based on consent, you have the right to withdraw that consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal. You can exercise your rights by emailing eshop.marosko@gmail.com.

complaint.title: Right to lodge a complaint
complaint.text: If you believe that the processing of your personal data violates GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority – for the Slovak Republic, this is the Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic, Hraničná 12, 820 07 Bratislava 27, https://dataprotection.gov.sk.

cookiesTech.title: Cookies used on this site
cookiesTech.text: This site uses three categories of cookies: necessary (required for basic site functionality, cannot be disabled), performance/analytics (Google Analytics – only with consent), and preference cookies (display of embedded content such as maps or videos – only with consent). You can change your choice at any time using the "Cookie settings" link in the site footer.

chat.title: Tool advisor
chat.greeting: Hello! I'm your expert advisor for woodcarving tools. How can I help you?
chat.errorNetwork: Sorry, we couldn't connect to the server. Please try again later.
